text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, while getting ready for training
with <chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

Excuse me? Are you
Trainer <username>?
choice_data_list: Um... May I ask your name?

text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry. I should have introduced myself.
I'm a reporter for Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: My name is Etsuko Otonashi.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I was looking for trainers to write about, and
Director Akikawa mentioned your name
specifically.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best not to interfere with your training. I
look forward to working with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first I'm hearing of any interview, but
Otonashi's polite and sincere attitude puts me at
ease.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you for agreeing to take part.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Let's get into it, shall we? As I'm sure you're
aware, the launch of the URA Finale has taken
the racing world by storm.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Could you tell us how that's affected you and
your trainee's outlook?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that there have been big changes, but
ever since the day I decided to walk with
<chrname>, my convictions have
always stayed the same.
choice_data_list:
I will keep supporting her so she can achieve
her dreams.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see. In other words, you consider your role as a
trainer to be...
choice_data_list: To help my Umamusume achieve her dreams!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Th-that's...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: That's simply... simply...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: SIMPLY AMAZING!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
To help your trainee Umamusume achieve her
dreams! That's what you said, no?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm sure you must be willing to take on any
burden with a smile!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Training wherever and whenever she asks! Taking
her on hot spring tours to recover from races!
Venturing to remote mountain streams just to
fetch her a cup of water!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Ah... What devotion... I'm so moved!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Splendid! I see the interview has started!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? Quite the talented trainer,
no?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! This is only our first meeting, but I've
been practically moved to tears!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It takes a special trainer to be willing to plunge
into a hurricane for their trainee!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! That's a prospective star
Umamusume's trainer for you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I've been keeping a close eye on your recent
activities!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But hmmm... How strange! It seems like you're
having trouble gaining fans.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Worry not! There's still time before the URA
Finale! I'm sure you can turn things around!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You're receiving a fair bit of support as well! With
a performance as compelling as yours, I knew
you'd win hearts!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Anticipation! Make the best of every race that
comes your way and show us some great results!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Astonishing! You're also receiving more support
than I could ever have imagined!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With a trainee as captivating as yours, a spot in
the URA Finale is no mere fantasy!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
A star Umamusume is measured by the amount of
support she has. That's how you can tell she is
loved.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I would also like to help you gather more support.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Gratitude! The media's assistance will be
essential, both for boosting the popularity of our
Umamusume and for ensuring the event succeeds!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you, Miss Otonashi! Help us make
the URA Finale a success!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Thank you very much for your time,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that I've met a powerful ally in the fight to
increase <chrname>'s support...
